description.value:
A short, slender wooden baton easily concealed beneath a cloak. Quick to draw and light in hand, it delivers sharp rapping blows to joints and skulls with surprising effect.

Training Levels

LevelProperties
UntrainedOne-Handed, Melee d4, Bludgeoning
BasicOne-Handed, Finesse, Light, Melee d4, Thrown (20/60), Bludgeoning, Conceal
MasterOne-Handed, Finesse, Light, Melee d4, Thrown (20/60), Bludgeoning, Conceal, Mighty Blow
Master PerkMighty Blow: the target must succeed on a CON save or suffer disadvantage on STR, DEX, and WIS saving throws until the end of its next turn.

rmeData.masterPerk: Mighty Blow: the target must succeed on a CON save or suffer disadvantage on STR, DEX, and WIS saving throws until the end of its next turn.
